name: Chess
description: Play chess interactively. The LLM can start games, make moves, and analyze positions.

tools.name: start_game
tools.description: Start a new chess game. Returns the initial board state.

color.description: Which color the human player plays. Defaults to white.

tools.name: move_piece
tools.description: Make a chess move using algebraic notation (e.g. from='e2', to='e4'). Only legal moves are accepted.

promotion.description: Promotion piece (queen/rook/bishop/knight) if pawn reaches last rank

tools.name: get_board_state
tools.description: Get the current board state including FEN, whose turn it is, move count, and game status.

tools.name: get_legal_moves
tools.description: Get legal moves, optionally filtered to a specific square.

square.description: Optional square to get moves for (e.g. 'e2'). If omitted, returns all legal moves.
